summary: P10 wired run-scenario to a fake smoke runner that validates config, plans, starts fake nodehost state, creates/checks fake cluster, cleans up, and writes run artifacts.
expected_outputs: run artifacts directory containing events.jsonl, run_status.json, cluster_plan.json, command log
Optional real Valkey path reports SKIPPED_RESOURCE when binary is absent; fake path must PASS

verified_outputs.output: run artifacts directory containing events.jsonl, run_status.json, cluster_plan.json, command log
verified_outputs.evidence: P10 unit test asserts artifact files exist

verified_outputs.output: Optional real Valkey path reports SKIPPED_RESOURCE when binary is absent; fake path must PASS

commands.command: python3 -m harness.harnessctl run-scenario --inventory inventories/single-mac-dev.yaml --scenario scenarios/smoke-6.yaml --run-id p10-smoke --backend fake --json

risks: Fake smoke PASS is not production Valkey validation.
Real Valkey path may be SKIPPED_RESOURCE when binary is unavailable.
